databrew.job.entitydetectorconfiguration: Configuration of entity detection for a profile job. When undefined, entity detection is disabled.

databrew.job.entitydetectorconfiguration.Description: Configuration of statistics that are allowed to be run on columns that contain detected entities. When undefined, no statistics will be computed on columns that contain detected entities.

Entity types to detect. Can be any of the following:  + USA_SSN+ EMAIL+ USA_ITIN+ USA_PASSPORT_NUMBER+ PHONE_NUMBER+ USA_DRIVING_LICENSE+ BANK_ACCOUNT+ CREDIT_CARD+ IP_ADDRESS+ MAC_ADDRESS+ USA_DEA_NUMBER+ USA_HCPCS_CODE+ USA_NATIONAL_PROVIDER_IDENTIFIER+ USA_NATIONAL_DRUG_CODE+ USA_HEALTH_INSURANCE_CLAIM_NUMBER+ USA_MEDICARE_BENEFICIARY_IDENTIFIER+ USA_CPT_CODE+ PERSON_NAME+ DATEThe Entity type group USA_ALL is also supported, and includes all of the above entity types except PERSON_NAME and DATE.
